channel.title: osmium; heptacyanoosmate(iv); pentagonal bipyramid polyhedron on LMI

item.title: The First Homoleptic Complex Of Seven-Coordinated Osmium: Synthesis Andcrystallographical Evidence Of Pentagonal Bipyramidal Polyhedron Ofheptacyanoosmate(Iv)
